race.comment: FIVE RINGS (3) came from last to score over a similar trip to this on the Gold Coast poly two back. Couldn't pick up last time in heavy going at Coffs Harbour but a step back in distance may have been partially to blame. Deserves another chance. SINATRA (5) tackled a Class 1 over this course and distance in heavy going recently and reversed some poor form with a dogged victory. Finds a similar set-up today so he must go into the numbers. FLYING BAT (1) went straight to the front and was never in doubt at Beaudesert when he last appeared a month ago. Should give them something to catch. GAVIN (8) finished third over 1518m at Coffs Harbour last time out to make it two minor placings in succession. In the mix.
